dashboard.description: Here is an overview of your scheduling system.

users.description: Create, update, and manage employee access.
users.name: Name

form.createDescription: Add a new employee or administrator account.
form.editDescription: Update the selected user's profile and role.

statusDialog.disableDescription: Disable {{name}} and invalidate their active sessions.
statusDialog.enableDescription: Enable {{name}} so they can sign in again.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

qualifications.title: Qualifications
qualifications.description: Select which positions this user is qualified to work.

errors.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.VERSION_CONFLICT: This user was updated elsewhere. Refresh and try again.

positions.description: Create and maintain the roles your department needs to staff.

form.createDescription: Add a role that can be staffed in future schedules.

deleteDialog.title: Delete position
deleteDialog.description: Delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

errors.POSITION_IN_USE: Position is used by a template shift

templates.title: Template Management
templates.description: Create and maintain reusable weekly shift blueprints.
templates.name: Name

form.createDescription: Add a new reusable weekly template.

detail.description: Update the template details and manage its weekly shifts.
detail.loadErrorDescription: The template could not be loaded right now.

deleteDialog.title: Delete template
deleteDialog.description: Delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

deleteShiftDialog.title: Delete shift
deleteShiftDialog.description: Delete {{summary}}? This action cannot be undone.

templates.shiftsDescription: Manage the template's shifts grouped by weekday.
templates.positionsLoadError: Failed to load positions for the shift editor.
templates.noPositions: Create positions before adding template shifts.
templates.noShiftsForWeekday: No shifts scheduled for this weekday yet.
templates.lockedBanner: This template is locked and cannot be edited or deleted. Clone it to make changes.

shiftDialog.createDescription: Add a weekly shift to this template.

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or fewer
validation.descriptionTooLong: Description must be 500 characters or fewer
validation.invalidWeekday: Weekday must be between Monday and Sunday
validation.invalidShiftTime: End time must be after start time
validation.invalidHeadcount: Required headcount must be at least 1

errors.INVALID_SHIFT_TIME: End time must be after start time
errors.INVALID_WEEKDAY: Weekday must be between Monday and Sunday

publications.title: Publication Management
publications.description: Create submission windows from templates and track their lifecycle.
publications.name: Name

form.createDescription: Choose a template and set the submission window.
form.noTemplates: Create a template before publishing shifts.

detail.description: Review the publication metadata and current effective state.
detail.loadErrorDescription: The publication could not be loaded right now.

stateDescription.assigning: Submissions are closed. Review candidates and assign the weekly roster.

activateDialog.title: Activate publication
activateDialog.description: Activate {{name}} now? Assignment changes will be locked after activation.

endDialog.title: End publication
endDialog.description: End {{name}} now? It will disappear from the current roster view.

deleteDialog.title: Delete publication
deleteDialog.description: Delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or fewer
validation.invalidWindow: Submission start must be before submission end, and submission end must be on or before the planned active time

errors.INVALID_PUBLICATION_WINDOW: The publication timestamps are not in chronological order
errors.PUBLICATION_NOT_ACTIVE: This publication is not active right now.
errors.PUBLICATION_NOT_ASSIGNING: This publication is not accepting assignment changes right now.
errors.PUBLICATION_NOT_COLLECTING: This publication is not collecting availability right now.
errors.PUBLICATION_NOT_DELETABLE: Only draft publications can be deleted.
errors.NOT_QUALIFIED: You are not qualified for this shift.

assignments.descriptionEditable: Click candidates to assign them to {{name}}. Click assigned employees to remove them.

assignments.loadError: The assignment board could not be loaded right now.
assignments.emptyWeekday: No shifts are scheduled for this weekday.
assignments.emptyCandidates: No candidates submitted availability for this shift.
assignments.emptyAssignments: Nobody is assigned to this shift yet.

autoAssignDialog.title: Auto-assign shifts
autoAssignDialog.description: This will replace all current assignments for {{name}}. Continue?

roster.title: Weekly Roster
roster.description: See the currently active weekly roster.
roster.descriptionWithPublication: Showing the active weekly roster for {{name}}.
roster.loadError: The roster could not be loaded right now.
roster.empty: There is no active publication right now.
roster.emptyWeekday: No shifts are scheduled for this weekday.
roster.emptyAssignments: No employees are assigned to this shift yet.

availability.title: Availability
availability.description: See the current publication and mark the shifts you can work.
availability.empty: There is no current publication right now.
availability.gridDescription: Check every shift you are available to work during this collection window.
availability.noShiftsForWeekday: No shifts are available for this weekday.
availability.noQualifiedShifts: You do not have any qualified shifts in this publication.

stateMessage.collecting: Submissions close at {{time}}. Update your availability before then.
stateMessage.assigning: Submissions are closed. The admin is assigning shifts now.
stateMessage.active: This publication is active. Availability changes are closed; check the roster view for assignments.

errors.NOT_QUALIFIED: You are not qualified for this shift.
